variants.core_thesis: Picker-dominant command-bar; binary filled/outlined dot indicator; current-language strict Dashboard. 14 HTML frames, ~115 click targets.
Per-row multi-chip coverage strip; twin Dashboard tiles; stepper create-version; card-pattern delete with visual consequence. 16 HTML frames, ~140 click targets.
Sticky sidebar language nav; coverage-matrix heatmap; tabbed map detail; right-edge drawer create-version; consequence-preview delete with live data manifest. 18 HTML frames, 135 click targets.

values: PRD-001 Multilingual for Redirect Manager — split per ADR-0004 reframe (analytics deferred to PRD-003, sync-back to PRD-004). PRD-000 shipped 2026-05-12 as en-only pure CRUD; language seam pre-parameterized on all Authoring reads/writes.

stage_history.error: PRD-001 cancelled at Tranche 1 (T001 capture pass). Real-tenant probe against CHAH DevEx Journey / PROD revealed UrlMapping field is SHARED on the stock Redirect Map template, not VERSIONED as PRD-001 assumed. Multilingual thesis (per-language redirect rules) does not hold; only __Display name is per-language (UNVERSIONED). Shipping PRD-001 as scoped would produce a misleading feature. Operator-confirmed cancellation; see ADR-0023 + docs/decisions.md § PRD-001 Tranche 1 captures.

m1.description: Language picker enumerates site-scoped languages on CHAH DevEx Journey / PROD; falls back to tenant-wide when site-scoped absent

m2.description: Per-language CRUD round-trip (read → edit → save → re-read) in <10s for en, de, and one additional language

m3.description: Create-version flow end-to-end on real tenant: (a) empty start, (b) copy from chosen source language — new version visible in Sitecore Authoring after one round trip

m4.description: Multi-language import/export round-trip: export site with maps in ≥2 languages → bundle contains all language versions → import to clean state → all language versions reconstituted

m5.description: Live walkthrough ≥5 min covering language switching across surfaces, create-version (both paths), delete (both scopes), display name editing, multilingual import/export — zero unrecoverable errors

host_frame_smoke.description: Playwright host-frame visual smoke: clipped iframe screenshots vs 10 POC frames from pocs/poc-v1-prd001/ on 5 axes (layout, typography, color, anatomy, state fidelity). All 10 frames must yield PASS or documented WARN with no unresolved FAIL.
host_frame_smoke.notes: Requires operator-supplied host URL + app origin. Auth is interactive — never script SSO. Serve POC via: npx serve pocs/poc-v1-prd001/

registration.description: Cloud Portal Test App re-verification: same App ID as PRD-000, no re-registration required, app loads correctly in all 3 extension points after PRD-001 deploy

operator_attention.item: Phasing reframed: ADR-0004 three-phase plan now four-phase (PRD-001 multilingual CRUD app-internal / PRD-002 Context Panel + head-app / PRD-003 analytics / PRD-004 sync-back). ADR-0014 captures the new phasing.

OQ-1 (createItemVersion/deleteItemVersion mutation shapes) is load-bearing — if deleteItemVersion absent, US-8 version-only is cut; if createItemVersion absent, US-6/US-7/US-11-create are cut. No silent fallback. Decision rule in PRD § 13 R-1.

OQ-2 (shared vs versioned field matrix on Redirect Map template) is a hard prerequisite at /architect — not progressive. Drives FR-3/4/7/21, AC-3.2/7.3/7.4, § 10 schema split, R-2, ADR-0015 schema final shape.
OQ-4 (__Display name accessor) — verify `field(name: "__Display name")` named accessor against real-tenant fixture during /architect.
OQ-5 (picker placement + Dashboard tile scoping + map list multilingual indicators + import preview language axis) resolved via 3 UI clickdummy variants at /architect.
OQ-7 (real-tenant fixture availability) — does CHAH DevEx Journey / PROD have multilingual Redirect Maps? Confirm or set up test data before /test.
Verb name corrected: createItemVersion → addItemVersion per Sitecore Authoring schema (ADR-0019). ADR-0016 amended in place. PRD-001 references rename via downstream task breakdown.
Site-scoped languages via Sites.Site.languages property access (no extra SDK call) — verified in node_modules .d.ts at line 1019. Tenant-wide xmc.sites.listLanguages is fallback only (ADR-0020).

addItemVersion / deleteItemVersion input + payload shapes NOT in @sitecore-marketplace-sdk/xmc .d.ts (file types only the SDK envelope). Verbs confirmed via sitecoreai-graphql-schemas skill § 1.7. Real-tenant probe required at /implement Tranche 1; per PRD R-1, if absent → US-6/US-7/US-8(a)/US-11-create cut.

Field-versioning matrix pinned in architecture § 4.3 as assumed shape (UrlMapping + __Display name versioned; RedirectType + 3 flags + itemName shared). ADR-0015 amended in place. /implement Tranche 1 capture confirms via itemTemplate.fields.versioning introspection.

Envelope correction: xmc.authoring.graphql mutations use DOUBLE .data.data unwrap (not single, as the old PRD-000 architecture incorrectly stated in one section). Production code in site/lib/sdk/redirects-write.ts already correct. Memory reference_marketplace_sdk_envelope_authoring_graphql confirms.

architecture.note: Carry from PRD-000 ADR-0011. No new extension points in PRD-001.

notes: Reframes ADR-0004 three-PRD phasing into four phases via ADR-0014. PRD-001 multilingual CRUD app-internal; PRD-002 Context Panel multilingual + head-app contract; PRD-003 analytics; PRD-004 sync-back. ADR-0004 marked Superseded.
Lifts ADR-0010 (en-only MVP) constraint — PRD-001 fulfills the deferral commitment.
Branch prd-001 stacked off main (PRD-000 already merged 2026-05-12 per ship report).
sdk_surface_split: n/a (1 new SDK surface — heuristic does not trigger)
5 new ADRs landed (0014-0018); ADR-0004 superseded by ADR-0014; ADR README index updated.
architect run: 4 new ADRs (0019-0022); ADR-0015 + ADR-0016 amended in place. SDK contract verification gate passed with honest absences recorded for addItemVersion/deleteItemVersion payload shapes.
adr_density_split: n/a (4 new ADRs in /architect run — under 5-ADR density gate)

verb correction: createItemVersion → addItemVersion (Sitecore Authoring schema). PRD-001 text not bulk-renamed; ADR-0019 + ADR-0016 amend carry the contract. Lead Developer must reference ADR-0019 over PRD prose for the verb name.
UI variants produced: 3 (V1 Topbar Pilot, V2 Coverage Atlas, V3 Workspace Frame). All Blok-conformant, real semantic tokens, no invented hex.

UI winner: V1 Topbar Pilot — operator selected for visual continuity with PRD-000 and natural-extension feel. POC at pocs/poc-v1-prd001/ (14 HTML frames, ~115 click targets) is the canonical visual reference for implementation.

CANCELLED 2026-05-13 at Tranche 1. Real-tenant probe (T001 OQ-A4 field-versioning matrix introspection) revealed UrlMapping field is SHARED on the stock Sitecore Redirect Map template — not VERSIONED as PRD-001 assumed. Multilingual thesis invalid against actual template configuration. PRD-001 closed without shipping. ADRs 0014-0022 marked Superseded by new ADR-0023. SDK findings (verb names, envelope shapes, full field-versioning matrix) preserved in docs/decisions.md § PRD-001 Tranche 1 captures. Branch prd-001 retains all planning artifacts as historical record + a dev-tools probe surface added to FullPage.tsx; the branch will not be merged to main. Operator decides next PRD at next /rubber-ducky.
